title: Show this to your driver
english_text: Hello, please take me to this address. Thank you.
chinese_text: 你好，请带我去这个地址，谢谢。
notes: Attach hotel or destination address below in Chinese.

title: Hotel check-in
english_text: Hello, I have a booking here. I would like to check in.
chinese_text: 你好，我有预订，我想办理入住。
notes: Show together with passport and booking confirmation.

title: I need help
english_text: Hello, I need some help. Could you please help me?
chinese_text: 你好，我需要帮助。可以帮帮我吗？
notes: Useful in stations, malls, streets, and service counters.

title: Can you tell me how to get there?
english_text: Excuse me, how can I get to this place?
chinese_text: 请问，我怎么去这个地方？
notes: Show destination name or map together.

title: Is this the right hotel or address?
english_text: Is this the correct hotel or address?
chinese_text: 这是正确的酒店或地址吗？
notes: Useful when uncertain after arriving nearby.

title: Ordering food
english_text: Hello, I would like to order this. Thank you.

title: I am vegetarian
english_text: I am vegetarian. I do not eat meat.

title: I need halal food
english_text: I need halal food. Do you have a halal option?
chinese_text: 我需要清真食物。你们有清真餐吗？

title: I cannot eat this ingredient
english_text: I cannot eat this ingredient. Please help me avoid it.
chinese_text: 我不能吃这种食材，请帮我避免。
notes: Should allow variable ingredient insertion later.

title: Where is the toilet?
english_text: Excuse me, where is the toilet?

title: Where is the metro station?
english_text: Excuse me, where is the metro station?
notes: Can be templated for train station, bus stop, or airport rail.

title: My payment is not working
english_text: Sorry, my payment is not working. Can I try another way?
chinese_text: 不好意思，我的支付不能用。我可以换一种方式吗？
notes: Very useful in real-life stress moments.

title: Do you have Wi-Fi?
notes: Useful at hotel, café, and restaurant.

title: Please speak slowly
english_text: Sorry, I don’t speak much Chinese. Please speak slowly.
chinese_text: 对不起，我不太会说中文，请说慢一点。
notes: Very useful in hotel, taxi, and service situations.
